name: StatusCodes
info:
Use actual decimal StatusCode value:
DataLost:                           2147483648
BadAggregateConfigurationRejected:  2161770496
etc.

Look values from Github node-opcua:
node-opcua/packages/node-opcua-status-code/source/_generated_status_codes.ts

name: Description
info:
This flow shows how to change server value
without a client.

name: Auth + Random Response
Generate Barcode (CRLF)
If 'W' then return random weight
API Hit Counter
Random block sender (server push)
Camera barcode / NoRead @500ms
